title: Entity Rules
description: `entity_rules` determine the specific entities that a KPI monitors in a service. This includes entities directly identified by title, and entities identified by regular expression-based rules.

attributes.name: rule_condition
attributes.label: rule_condition
attributes.description: Uses the value AND indicating this rule appends all nested rules contained in the `rule_items` attribute.

attributes.name: rule_items
attributes.label: rule_items
attributes.description: Array of rules that are appended within a rule group.

attributes.name: field
attributes.label: field
attributes.description: The field in the entity definition to compare values to evaluate this rule.

attributes.name: rule_type
attributes.label: rule_type
attributes.description: Takes values `not` or `matches` to indicate whether it's an inclusion or exclusion rule. Value can be `matchesblank` or `doesnotmatchblank` when used with service templates.

attributes.name: value
attributes.label: value
attributes.description: Values to evaluate in the rule. To specify multiple values, separate them with a comma. Values are not case sensitive.

attributes.name: field_type
attributes.label: field_type
attributes.description: Takes values `alias` or `info` specifying in which category of fields the `field` attribute is located.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
